title: Comedy Circus Ke Tansen
desc: Renowned personalities team up with talented stand-up comedians to put on hilarious performances, aiming to impress the judges.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Manmohan is being looked after by Angoori, who asks Vibhuti for assistance with feeding him. Later, Vibhuti relays Manmohan's wish for them to go to a movie.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Inspector Happu tells Anita about a series of thefts taking place in the neighbourhood; Vibhuti takes Anita to Manmohan's house and reveals that his chicken pox is in fact drawn using a marker.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Vibhuti impersonates Jholewale Baba by talking to Angoori's plants.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Angoori follows Vibhuti's instructions and locks Manmohan in the bathroom overnight.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Manmohan asks a lot of questions to a preaching Vibhuti, who answers them and insults him; Vibhuti confides in Anita about his dream, where she is arrested.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Saxena faints after Angoori hits him and Vibhuti mistakenly believes he is dead. Later, the Tiwaris and the Mishras wonder how to dispose of Saxena's corpse.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Angoori attempts to tell Amma Ji about a murder, but fails. Happu arrives seeking Saxena, a witness in Manmohan's corruption case.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: A rickshaw driver comes to Anita's house and demands compensation for all the free rides Vibhuti has enjoyed over the past few months.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Vibhuti Narayan Mishra and Manmohan Tiwari live in the same neighbourhood in Kanpur. They both try to impress each other's wives but end up landing in peculiar situations.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: In an attempt to sabotage Happu's catering business, Manmohan messes with Happu's tiffin. However, Angoori accidentally swaps the tiffins, leading to Manmohan eating the contaminated food.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Vibhuti Narayan Mishra and Manmohan Tiwari live in the same neighbourhood in Kanpur. They both try to impress each other's wives but end up landing in peculiar situations.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Vibhuti Narayan Mishra and Manmohan Tiwari live in the same neighbourhood in Kanpur. They both try to impress each other's wives but end up landing in peculiar situations.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Manmohan tells Anita about Vibhuti's lover and Vibhuti suggests that Angoori pretend to have an affair. Later, Manmohan becomes upset about Angoori's affair and Amma Ji expels Manmohan from the house.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Anita and Angoori discover the truth about their husbands and apologise to them. Meanwhile, while watching a video of Vibhuti's college play, Manmohan criticizes him.

title: Entertainment
desc: Akhil, an underdog and a failure, comes to know that his real father is a rich diamond merchant who has just passed away. When he goes to retrieve his wealth, he learns that a dog has inherited it.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Vibhuti Narayan Mishra and Manmohan Tiwari live in the same neighbourhood in Kanpur. They both try to impress each other's wives but end up landing in peculiar situations.

desc: Vibhuti Narayan Mishra and Manmohan Tiwari live in the same neighbourhood in Kanpur. They both try to impress each other's wives but end up landing in peculiar situations.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Anita falls on Vibhuti's slippers and calls him careless. Later, they have a fight and Anita throws him out of the house.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Saxena reaches Anita's place and gets relevant information from her. Later, when Vibhuti receives a divorce notice from Saxena, he feels bad.

title: Paramavatar Shri Krishna
desc: Kanha baffles everyone by deciding to make the Moon static, while Lord Vishnu convinces the other Gods to go about their work. Radha races to Sage Gargacharya.

title: Man Mohini
desc: A new couple, Ram and Sia, are experiencing some seriously creepy and unsettling things in their marriage. Is it just bad luck, or something more sinister?

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Vibhuti grows suspicious after discovering a strand of hair on Manmohan's shirt and vows to find its owner. Meanwhile, Manmohan tries to protect Anita from a perceived threat.
